Notice

Are you sure?

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: 1 October 2025

Welcome to Asiye. We are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share your data.

1. Information We Collect

Personal Data: We collect your name, surname, and phone number during signup.

Location Data: To provide our service, we collect your real-time geographic location when you use the app. This is essential for matching you with nearby taxis.

Usage Data: We collect information about how you interact with our service, including trip history and parcel requests.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your data to operate and improve the Asiye service, including connecting commuters with drivers, processing payments, ensuring safety, and for customer support.

3. Data Sharing

We share your location and name with drivers when you request a ride or parcel delivery. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

4. Your Rights

You have the right to access and delete your personal information. You can request account deletion from your profile page.

Please replace this placeholder with your full, official Privacy Policy.

Account Deletion: In compliance with Apple Guideline 5.1.1, users can delete their accounts at any time. Selecting "Delete Account" in the Profile section will immediately and permanently scrub your personal data, identity documents, and real-time location from our active systems.

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: 1 October 2025

By using the Asiye application, you agree to these terms and conditions.

1. Use of Service

Asiye provides a platform to connect commuters and drivers. We are not a transportation carrier and are not responsible for the actions or inactions of any user.

2. User Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account. You must provide accurate information during registration.

3. Payments and Credits

Ride and parcel requests may require credits. Credits can be earned or purchased. Subscription services provide unlimited requests for the duration of the subscription.

4. Limitation of Liability

Asiye is not liable for any damages, liability or losses arising out of your use of the service or your inability to access or use the service.

Please replace this placeholder with your full, official Terms & Conditions.
